---
title: "Curriculum vitae"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
# copy the PDF into the built site at /cv/RESUME431.pdf
resources:
  - "RESUME431.pdf"
---


[Download current CV](RESUME431.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}

<!-- Most reliable embed: <object>; shows PDF if the browser supports it,
     otherwise shows a fallback link. -->
<object data="RESUME431.pdf#view=FitH"
        type="application/pdf"
        width="100%"
        height="900px">
  <p>
    Your browser couldn't display the PDF inline.
    <a href="RESUME431.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open the CV in a new tab</a>.
  </p>
</object>
